value.PublicRemarks:
Welcome to your pre-construction paradise! This stunning Mizner Development masterpiece will boast 100 feet of prime waterfront on a wide canal, just seconds from the Intracoastal. Imagine waking up to serene water views and enjoying your morning coffee as boats glide by.
Step inside the enormous great room, perfect for entertaining or simply relaxing with family. The chef's kitchen is a culinary dream, complete with a spacious pantry and top-of-the-line appliances. Hosting parties is a breeze with the club room and bar, while the office provides a quiet retreat for work or study.
Ride the elevator or take the floating stairs to the second level entertaining space, complete with water views and spacious balcony. Five ensuite bedrooms, three offering breathtaking water views and direct balcony access. The primary suite is a true sanctuary, featuring expansive Intracoastal views that will leave you in awe.
Expansive windows flood the home with natural light, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere. Plus, with A-rated schools nearby, this home is perfect for families.
A three-car garage ensures plenty of space for vehicles and storage. You can still select your preferred finishes to match your personal style, making this home truly yours.

PLEASE NOTE: ALL PHOTOS FROM PREVIOUS BUILDS. ELEVATION IS ARTISTIC RENDERING. 2025 COMPLETION.

Not to be rivaled this estate offers a 14 stall center aisle barn, large tack room, commercial laundry room, luxurious owners quarters with exceptional detail, a tennis pavilion, 6 acre irrigated Bermuda grass jump field and a new 180' X 300' riding arena adjacent to the jump field. There are guest and meeting cottages that open to a grand patio with pergolas over looking the private pond and waterfall. Truly a ''Must See'' property for the serious equestrian.

Beautifully renovated, this home nestled on 1.82 acres offers a tranquil retreat with 3 bedrooms and 2 baths, ideal for raising a family. Situated just minutes away from Publix and CVS, and a short drive to the charming downtown areas of Eustis and Mount Dora renowned for their antique shops and vibrant festivals, you'll have ample opportunities for family outings and gatherings with friends. New AC Unit, smart mirror in master bathroom and new appliances. Experience the best of country living with easy access to Orlando's attractions, beaches, and historic downtown districts via the nearby 429 connector.

The lucky few residents will enjoy modern, Alfonso Jurado designed townhomes offering premium finishes selected by local renowned designer, Interiors by Steven G. Each residence will offer a tastefully appointed modern kitchen, in home elevator, rooftop terrace, summer kitchen, and a whole house generator. value.PublicRemarks: NEW ROOF ON THE WAY AND PREMIER GOLF MEMBERSHIP!  Spectacular waterfront estate home offering many upgrades with an unbelievably rare, serene long lake view.  This home offers 5br plus den and 4.5 baths. Spacious kitchen has been upgraded with ALL NEW S/S appliances (2023) to include range hood and gas stove.  Large walk-in pantry with custom shelving. Expansive living room area greets you upon entering displaying phenomenal water views. Elegant first floor primary bath has been redesigned to include NEW (2023) cabinets and countertops, his/her sinks and closet for extra storage. 2 a/c's 2023, 3rd AC unit 2021. Pool heater and filter 2023. Newly screened lanai .  New interior paint (2023) and exterior paint 2025.Primary his/hers separate closets with NEW custom built ins. The newly  screened lanai contains an outdoor kitchen with sink, refrigerator and built in grill with double side burners. Pool with hot tub has NEW heater, filter and newer pump.  Ample outdoor space provides for multiple seating areas and chat groupings. If you love being outdoors and entertaining along the water this outdoor oasis will not disappoint.  3 of the 4 guest rooms have NEW carpet and ensuite baths and walk in closets with custom shelving.  NEW carpet on stairs to private large loft and 2 generously sized guest rooms offering privacy for guests. NEW impact glass front doors provide both privacy and elegance.  Laundry room with sink and NEW washer and dryer. NEW TV in family room. NEW garage door motors/springs. Ducts cleaned 2023. NEW shades. NEW access door in primary bedroom. This home is truly move in ready.  This masterpiece in the impeccably maintained neighborhood of Isla Vista will allow you to begin living the ultimate experience that exists within the Club at Ibis. 3 golf courses, tennis, pickleball, multiple dining options and a dynamic sports complex all await the lucky buyer!

value.PublicRemarks: Discover coastal living at its finest in this spacious retreat nestled in The Patrician building steps away from the pristine beach! The gorgeous seaside sanctuary boasts an abundance of natural light and soaring 9-foot ceilings, creating an open and airy ambiance through-out. This gorgeous unit has been impeccably maintained and decorated! Step outside onto the private balcony to soak in breathtaking ocean views. Experience resort-style living at The Patrician, where residents enjoy a wealth of amenities including a heated pool, fitness center, community room, and inviting lobby with around-the-clock security. Imagine a place where you can bask in the sun on sandy shores during the day and immerse yourself in the excitement of lively nightlife once the sun sets. This destination combines the best of both worlds, offering easy access to pristine beaches where you can enjoy relaxation and water activities by day, and bustling nightlife scenes filled with music, entertainment, and delicious dining options by night.

value.PublicRemarks: Welcome to 131 W Bears Club Drive, located on nearly 0.6 acres in Jupiter's prestigious golf community. This stunning estate, designed by Randall Stofft and built by Onshore Construction in 2018, boasts over 12,000 total square feet, 7 bedrooms, 8 full bathrooms, and two half bathrooms. Step outside to enjoy the lush landscaping that creates a tranquil outdoor space perfect for entertaining, complete with ample seating, a summer kitchen, large pool, spa, pergola, and a fireplace. The Bear's Club stands as the most expansive golf community in the area, spanning 400 acres with just 100 residences. Renowned for its world-class golf facilities, the club counts multiple PGA and LPGA tour players among its members. Known for its commitment to excellence, The Bear's Club offers the highest quality standards, finest amenities, programs, and services to its members and their guests.

value.PublicRemarks: Move-in ready 2-story ''Beach House'' living inside Parker Highland awaits - with ocean and pool access right outside your door. This Ralph Lauren-designed SW corner townhouse offers over 4,700 total SF with 5 beds, 5 full baths + Den. Lower level has direct access to pool, BBQ and beach - no lobby or elevator needed. Enjoy ocean views from 2 wraparound balconies and 270° of natural light. Fully renovated, with high-end finishes and appliances. This Beach Home comes with 2 garage spots and A/C storage. Parker Highland has only 26 units, completely modernized, full reserves and in full compliance. It is a midrise, self-managed, pet-friendly, oceanfront building with 400' of private beach, glass balconies, impact windows, generator, high elevation, rebar construction, and its own dog park. Townhouse 2B/3B in Parker Highland  Unit 2B/3B - Residence Details " Two-level southwest corner residence with interior staircase " 5 bedrooms, 5 full bathrooms, plus den " 4,298 SF interior living area " Two wraparound balconies (214 SF each) " Total area: approx. 4,725 SF " Dual entry from both the 2nd and 3rd floors " Lower level offers direct exterior access to pool deck and private beach " Residence is in superior interior condition and fully move-in ready, with no interior work needed " Two deeded garage parking spaces (one of only two residences with two) " Private A/C storage room in garage " Additional common storage for bicycles, kayaks, surfboards, and beach items  Parker Highland - Building Overview " Boutique oceanfront building with only 26 residences " Two-level residences limited to just 2 units " Self-managed with transparent governance " Fully reserved with completed Structural Integrity Reserve Study " Completed 40-Year Milestone Inspection (SB 4-D compliant) " Major building modernization completed and fully funded " No pending or future special assessments " Impact windows and doors throughout " Glass balcony systems " Rebar-reinforced concrete construction " Full-building generator " High natural elevation " No neighboring high-rise buildings " 400 feet of private deeded oceanfront  Building Improvements (Completed) " Exterior facade restoration " Balcony restoration and waterproofing " Parking deck resurfacing with new flooring system " Roof replacement " Elevator modernization " Fire pump and cooling tower replacement " Generator upgrades " Renovated lobby, reception, mailroom, and common areas " Pool and pool deck updates  Amenities " Doorman / concierge-attended lobby " Resident social lounge and game room " Fitness center " Heated oceanfront pool and spa " Private BBQ area " Dedicated dog park " Underground garage and additional parking deck " Private deeded beach access with security and maintenance  Highland Beach " Quiet, oceanfront town between Boca Raton and Delray Beach " Approx. 1.1 square miles with limited development " Average natural elevation approx. 13 feet " Town-operated police, fire, water, and municipal services " Approx. 30 minutes to FLL or PBI airports " Close to Boca Raton Airport, Brightline, Mizner Park, and Atlantic Avenue

value.Directions: On A1A +/- 1 mile south of Ft Pierce Inlet. Just North of Jaycee Park.
value.PublicRemarks: Huge townhouse in the oceanside community of Mariner Bay! Light-filled corner residence. 2,201 a/c sf.  2 bed/2.5 bath + sitting, media & family rooms. 2CG. New roof, exterior paint, A/C & hot water heater.  Former model w/extensive upgrades & built-ins. 9.5' ceilings on both floors. 2nd floor impact glass. Expansive balcony off sitting room. Large covered patio. Mariner Bay is a gated community of 136 townhomes & Villas offering residents an amazing lifestyle. Amenities include: Clubhouse w/large social room, pool, fitness center and saunas. Rent: 2x/yr, 6 month min. 36 resident-owned docks. Well-funded HOA. . Situated between A1A and the ICW.  +/- 1- mile to the Fort Pierce Inlet. 40' dock available for sale! Island living at an inland price! See Supplement 40' Dock Available!  Quiet, interior, corner location, backing to a landscaped greenbelt, then the clubhouse/pool. Only a short walk to the beach!  Jaycee Park, is directly to the south of Mariner Bay. Tennis, pickle ball, basketball, pavilions for picnics, playground + a boat/jetski/kayak launch area.  Great Location 1 Mile to the Inlet (Square Grouper, Island Beach Bar, Manatee Island, Chuck's, Angelina's Pizza, Cream Republic, etc.) 4 Miles to Downtown Fort Pierce (Sunrise Theater, Sailfish Brewing, Casa Pasta, The Fort Steakhouse, Cobb's Landing, Marina Square, A E Backus Museum, Farmers' mkt, Manatee Center, etc.) 8 Miles/17 Minutes to the Treasure Coast International Airport 23 Miles/35 Minutes to Downtown Stuart 18 Miles/33 Minutes to Downtown Vero 20 Miles/ 40 Minutes to Vero Regional Airport 58 Miles/60 minutes to Gardens Mall PB Gardens 72Miles/70 Minutes to PBIA 1.5 Hours to Boca Raton Town Center Mall/ Glades Road Less than 2 Hours to Downtown Fort Lauderdale 135 Miles/2.5 Hours to Miami All times and distance are approximate

value.PublicRemarks:
PARADISE FOR BOATERS!! Spacious 2 Bedrm/2 Bath Doublewide in Hidden Harbour Estates, 55+ Manufactured Home Community in Port Salerno. This home backs to a freshwater swale & large easement which affords you complete privacy. A wonderful spot to create your own oasis. The Living Room is Large & Open & adjacent to the kitchen for ease of entertainment. The Master Bedroom is large w ensuite full bath. The 2nd bedroom is also a good size w full bath on the hall.  Brand New 4 Ton A/C 2024.
Metal Roof. HOA fee of $329/mo. includes basic cable, water/sewer, trash, recreational facilities, lawn care & reserve funds. Deep water dockage in the Manatee Pocket for $3.24/ft/mo.  Mins to Ocean/Intracoastal, shopping & sea food restaurants. NO RENTALS. Certified service pets only. YOU OWN THE LAND!!.

value.PublicRemarks: Experience unparalleled views of the majestic Atlantic Ocean. Welcome to coastal luxury living at its finest! Discover your oasis in this stunning new construction oceanside condominium, boasting Indulge in spacious comfort with 3 bedrooms & 3 1/2 bathrooms, perfectly designed for both relaxation and entertainment. Step inside your semi-private elevator to be greeted by sleek tile floors throughout, offering both elegance and durability for effortless coastal living. Culinary enthusiasts will delight in the gourmet kitchen featuring top-of-the-line Wolf & Sub-Zero appliances, complemented by exquisite Italian cabinets that add a touch of sophistication to every meal. Flooded with natural light, this residence exudes a sense of warmth & tranquility, creating a serene ambiance for your relaxation. Delivery Q1 2026.

There are 2 separate clubhouses one of which is an Athletic Center W/ an Olympic sized pool, resistance pool, indoor racquetball court, full service beauty salon, state of the art gym, aerobics room, classroom, sauna, steam and tennis courts. a poolside cafe W/ indoor & outdoor service, gorgeous pool with cabana awnings, Pickleball, multiple card and game rooms, a huge arts and crafts room, billiards, and lounge. value.PublicRemarks:
''New'' Modern Malibu-inspired Sanctuary Point Estate sets the stage for this Sanctuary point estate with 170± feet of wraparound protected waterfrontage by award-winning team of Stephen Albanese Builders, Quinn Miklos Architects and Marc-Michaels Interior Design. Epic foyer entrance with architectural staircase ascending up 3 levels opens to this glass encased estate with all major rooms facing either the waterway, tranquil bird preserve and Intracoastal waterway. South wing Primary suite includes dual baths and wardrobes, lounge, separate exercise room and waterfront balcony. Resort-like pool/spa and patio with expansion entertainment lanai with summer kitchen and cabana. Other amenities include a Club Room with separate office, 3rd Level Game Room, Wine Room, Elevator and 3.5 bay garag The Sanctuary is Boca Raton's highly coveted and private Celebrity Enclave with 24-hour guard house security, road and waterway patrol.

value.PublicRemarks: . Last house to be built, 2002! Large, wide living room, with wood burning fireplace. Built in granite topped bar. Large kitchen, many drawers. 1 bedroom en suite plus half bath, &  laundry on main floor.  2 en suite bedrooms, including primary on second floor. Room enough for a potential 4th bedroom, plus den/office/loft. Driveway wide enough for 2 cars, plus one car garage. Pavers on driveway and walkways. . Heated community pool, sprinkler system and lawns,  trimming,  plus clubhouse, Xfinity, plus HBO included. Maintenance $1500.50 per quarter to live across from Atlantic Ocean in a house, on Hutchinson Island.  Walk across to Waveland Beach, with lifeguards. Or follow trail back to pier on Intracoastal. Being sold as is!

value.PublicRemarks: Forte Luxe, Jupiter's newest peninsula waterfront address, is a boutique collection of 15 finely appointed townhomes, boasting protected panoramic views of Bahama blue water. The lucky few residents will enjoy modern, Alfonso Jurado designed townhomes offering premium finishes selected by local renowned designer, Interiors by Steven G. Each residence will offer a tastefully appointed modern kitchen, in home elevator, rooftop terrace, summer kitchen, and a whole house generator. Optional dipping pools are available, as are a limited number of boat slips for vessels up to 50 feet, with no fixed bridges separating you from the Jupiter Inlet. Forte Luxe will also offer an infinity pool exclusively for residents. Sales gallery now open by appointment only!

value.PublicRemarks: Beautiful well maintained 3 bedroom 2 bath manufactured home in Spanish Lakes Community with lake views. Custom Palm Harbor Model built in 2005 located at the end of a cul-de-sac. Home is 1,853 sqft of living with a den that could be a fourth bedroom with a separate entrance. Home features include drywall finish with extra insulation between walls and floor. Wood laminate floors in the family room, dining room and den. Title in kitchen and bathrooms. Island in kitchen with corian sink. Master suite has separate shower and jacuzzi tub. Family room has a wood burning fireplace. All stainless steel appliances and upgraded Cherry cabinets. Laundry room inside with large pantry. Brand new water heater, Brand New A/C unit and Home has 6 solar tubes for nature light throughout the home. Home comes partially furnished and a must see. Land Lease, buyer must be approved by the HOA to purchase. Home is in the pet section.

value.PublicRemarks: Back on the market! Charming corner unit offers 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms in this desirable active adult community close to downtown ft pierce. The full size covered front patio is perfect for relaxing, to the left of it is a wooded area full of trees that gives that fresh breeze perfect on a nice afternoon. Roof was replaced in 2023, toilets and  faucets 2024. Interior Recently painted, baseboards replaced. The back patio gives an uninterrupted view of the lake and the bridge across the street. It also leads to the shared laundry unit. This community has a lot of amenities including a swimming pool, tennis court, gym and shuffleboard. HOA fees include cable, fiber optic internet, water, sewer, trash removal and lawn care.  Your Florida home is waiting. Schedule your private tour!

Caretta is Juno's newest luxury development with amenities including a neighborhood restaurant located within the community, rooftop pool, sauna, dog park, fitness center, golf simulator is just some of the amenities to help simplify your lifestyle.
